response.overview: The story is about a man named Pasha who aspires to become a singer and has a very good talent in voice imitation. Pasha unintentionally falls into a big trouble. He has to raise a lot of money, so he sings at weddings. On the other hand, we have a character named Ilya, who is a popular singer and has a 10-year contract with an influential person. One night, a problem happens to Ilya and his larynx is seriously damaged, so that he cannot sing for a month. This happens when he has a concert for 10 nights soon.
response.title: Double Song
